## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Rendered UI checked when the change affects the Web app

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No `.env`, mailbox database, email content, credentials, API keys, logs, or private screenshots are included
- [ ] New API/MCP behavior uses least-privilege defaults
- [ ] Documentation and configuration examples were updated when needed
